name: Huaan Securities Co., Ltd.
summary: Huaan Securities Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, provides securities brokerage, investment consulting, and other services in China. The company also offers investment banking services, including IPO, merger and acquisition, refinancing, and new board listing services; and asset management services. In addition, it provides financial services; and specializes in fixed income securities and related derivative products. The company was founded in 1991 and is based in Hefei, China.
